mapper.select: SELECT im.company_code AS companyCode, im.company_name AS companyName, eh.stock_code AS stockCode, eh.stock_name AS stockName, eh.quantity AS quantity, eh.eval_amount AS evaluated FROM external_holdings eh JOIN linked_institutions li ON li.id = eh.institution_id JOIN institution_master im ON im.id = li.institution_master_id WHERE eh.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY im.sort_order ASC, eh.stock_code ASC
